Title: Intranet Modernization
Description: Migrate the corporate intranet from SharePoint 2019 on-premises to SharePoint Online with modern web parts and hub site architecture.

Title: ERP System Upgrade
Description: Upgrade the enterprise resource planning system from v4.2 to v5.0 including data migration and user training across all departments.

Title: Employee Wellness Program
Description: Launch a comprehensive employee wellness program including mental health resources, fitness subsidies, and quarterly wellness challenges.

Title: GDPR Compliance Audit
Description: Conduct a full audit of data processing activities across all systems to ensure compliance with updated GDPR requirements.

Title: Cloud Migration Phase 3
Description: Migrate remaining on-premises workloads to Azure including legacy file servers and departmental applications.

Title: Brand Refresh Campaign
Description: Redesign the corporate brand identity including logo refresh, updated color palette, and new marketing collateral templates.

Title: Facilities Consolidation
Description: Consolidate the satellite office operations into the main campus following the building expansion completion.

Title: New Hire Onboarding Automation
Description: Automate the new hire onboarding workflow using Power Automate and SharePoint, replacing the manual paper-based process.
